news.summary: American Vanguard, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker AVD, received notification from the New York Stock Exchange on April 2, 2025, stating that the company is not meeting the requirements outlined in Section 802.01E of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This non-compliance is a result of the delay in filing the Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, with the SEC. The company disclosed that it would not be able to submit the Form 10-K within the 15-day extension period.
news.headline: American Vanguard, listed on NYSE under AVD, faces compliance issue for delayed 10-K filing with SEC.

news.summary: In Atlanta, Logility Supply Chain Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: LGTY) has been successfully acquired by Aptean, Inc., a prominent provider of enterprise software solutions globally. The acquisition, valued at $14.30 per share in cash, was formally announced on January 24, 2025, and officially sanctioned by Logility shareholders on April 3, 2025. As a consequence of this transaction's completion, Logility's common stock will cease to be listed.
news.headline: Aptean acquires Logility for $14.30/share, approved by shareholders. Deal finalized after announcement on Jan 24, 2025.

news.summary: Destiny Tech100 Inc. (NYSE: DXYZ) has released its financial report for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company disclosed a net asset value (NAV) of $6.44 per common stock share, which marks a rise from $5.32 per share in the previous quarter. As of the specified date, Destiny Tech100's investment portfolio held a total fair value of around $70.9 million, inclusive of short-term investments. The fund retains stakes in numerous privately-owned entities.
news.headline: Destiny Tech100 Inc. reports Q4 2024 results with a NAV of $6.44 per share, up from $5.32 in Q3, and an investment portfolio valued at $70.9 million.

news.summary: Today, Chanson International Holding (Nasdaq: CHSN), a company operating bakery, seasonal, and beverage products through chain stores in China and the United States, revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year. The news was announced in URUMQI, China on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: Chanson International Holding reports fiscal year 2024 financial results in URUMQI, China; ticker symbol CHSN (Nasdaq) mentioned.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Haikou, China, China Pharma Holdings Inc. announced that it plans to carry out a 1-for-10 reverse stock split on its common stock (NYSE American: CPHI) starting on Tuesday, April 15, 2025. This move is expected to impact the trading of the stock and will consolidate every 10 shares into one share.
news.headline: China Pharma Holdings Inc. will undergo a 1-for-10 reverse stock split on April 15, 2025, trading to start afterward.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 4, 2025, Triumph Financial, Inc. (Nasdaq: TFIN) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter financial results and management insight post-market close on Wednesday, April 16, 2025. Interested parties can access the details on the company's website, tfin.com, subsequent to the filing.
news.headline: Triumph Financial (Nasdaq: TFIN) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 16, expect after-market close, available on tfin.com.

news.summary: Toronto- Superior Plus Corp. (TSX: SPB) is set to unveil its first-quarter financial results for 2025 on May 13, 2025, post-market close. The company will conduct a conference call and webcast the following day at 8:30 AM EDT, on May 14, 2025, to discuss the results. Anyone interested can register as a participant using the provided link. The webcast will be accessible live and for replay on Superior's official website.
news.headline: Superior Plus (TSX: SPB) to release 2025 first quarter results on May 13, 2025. Conference call and webcast on May 14 at 8:30 AM EDT. Register to participate. Webcast link: https://www.superiorplus.com/

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Wintrust Financial Corporation based in Rosemont, Illinois, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share for its common stock (Nasdaq: WTFC). This dividend was approved by the Company's Board of Directors and is set to be paid on May 22, 2025, to shareholders holding stock as of May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Wintrust Financial Corp declares $0.50 per share dividend; payable May 22 to shareholders on record as of May 8.

news.summary: Mersana Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed that on April 1, 2025, a sub-committee of their Board of Directors awarded a restricted stock unit (RSU) to a new employee who joined the company in March 2025. The RSU allows the employee to acquire 26,790 shares of Mersana's common stock. This award was given in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Mersana focuses on developing antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) for treating cancers with high unmet medical needs.
news.headline: Mersana Therapeutics grants 26,790 RSU shares to new employee under Nasdaq rule; focuses on cancer treatment.
Evercore ISI's Emanuel shares insight on market selloff, noting a palpable sense of fear among investors.

news.summary: NewtekOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEWT) headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida, is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, post-market closing. The upcoming conference call to review these results will be held on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 8:30 am Eastern Time. Key executives including CEO Barry Sloane, CFO M. Scott Price, and Chief Accounting Officer Frank DeMaria will lead the discussion. Investors and stakeholders are invited to participate in the call to gain insights into the company's performance during this period.
news.headline: NewtekOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEWT) to report Q1 2025 results on May 6, 2025, with conference call on May 7, 2025, at 8:30am ET. CEO, CFO, and CAO to discuss financials.

news.summary: Artesian Water Company, Inc., a subsidiary of Artesian Resources Corporation (Nasdaq: ARTNA), submitted an application to the Delaware Public Service Commission on April 04, 2025, to alter customer rates. The application seeks a 12.41% increase in revenue, equivalent to about $10.8 million annually. This adjustment includes recovering investments made under the current 1.66% Distribution System Improvement Charge, which will revert to 0.0% with new base rates. Consequently, customers can expect a 10.75% rise in billed rates. The application will undergo thorough evaluation by both the PSC and the Division of the Public Advocate (DPA).
news.headline: Artesian Water Co. seeks a 12.41% rate increase, approx $10.8M annually in DE, PSC and DPA to review the filing.

news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on April 4, 2025, TEN Ltd. disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved the standard quarterly cash dividend of around $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares, listed under NYSE as TENPRF. The company, recognized as a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, continues its commitment to providing returns to shareholders through dividends on the Series F Preferred Shares.
news.headline: TEN Ltd. declares $0.59375 dividend per share for Series F Preferred Shares. Board made decision on April 4, 2025.

news.summary: On April 1, 2025, Syndax Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: SNDX) disclosed the granting of inducement awards to acquire up to 50,000 shares of common stock to four new employees under the Company's 2023 Inducement Plan amid its focus on cancer therapies. These stock options will have a vesting period of four years, with 25% of the shares vesting after one year from the commencement date, followed by monthly vesting of 1/48th of the shares over the subsequent 36 months, contingent upon the employees' continuous service at Syndax until the relevant vesting dates.
news.headline: Syndax Pharmaceuticals granted inducement awards for 50,000 shares of stock to 4 new employees on April 1, 2025.

news.summary: Cipher Mining Inc. (NASDAQ:CIFR) has recently shared its operational report for March 2025, detailing key production figures. Based in New York, the company provided an unaudited overview, showcasing important insights into its activities during the specified period.
news.headline: Cipher Mining Inc. provides an operational update for March 2025 in New York, NASDAQ:CIFR, with unaudited production figures.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Verve Therapeutics in Boston disclosed that they granted equity awards to three freshly hired employees on March 31, 2025. These awards were given as part of the company's 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This action was taken to attract the new employees to join the company, complying with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Verve Therapeutics grants equity awards to 3 new employees under the 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan on March 31, 2025.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Adverum Biotechnologies, Inc. in Redwood City, California disclosed the granting of an inducement award by the Compensation Committee of Adverum’s Board of Directors. The award includes non-qualified stock options enabling the purchase of 30,000 shares of common stock and was offered to a new employee under Adverum’s 2017 Inducement Plan. The approval of this award as an inducement vital to the new employee's employment aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Adverum Biotechnologies grants employee 30,000 stock options under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), as per a press release.
For the week, the S&P 500 fell 9.08%, the Nasdaq declined 10.02%, and the Dow fell 7.86%, the Russell 2000 small cap index fell 9.70%
S&P 500 ends week down 9.1% in the biggest decline since March 2020

news.summary: Despite the expectation that Trump's election would boost the crypto industry, it just experienced its worst quarter in years. Bitcoin and Ether had their worst Q1 in seven years, with Coinbase stock plunging by 33%. However, Coinbase’s revenues doubled in 2024 to $6.6 billion, and it reported growth in adjusted earnings. The Trump family is investing in a Bitcoin mining venture, 'American Bitcoin,' aiming to become the world’s largest Bitcoin miner. Stablecoin issuer Tether acquired 8,888 Bitcoin and holds 100,521 BTC valued at $8.7 billion, generating profit from its stablecoin operations. GameStop raised $1.5 billion for Bitcoin purchases and plans to add Bitcoin to its balance sheet, alongside potentially using cash reserves for future acquisitions.
news.headline: Crypto industry sees worst quarter as Bitcoin and Ether record worst Q1 in 7 years, Coinbase stock plunges 33%. Trump family backs Bitcoin mining venture. Tether acquires 8,888 BTC. GameStop raises $1.5B for Bitcoin purchases.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Rock Tech Lithium Inc. (TSXV: RCK) (OTCQX: RCKTF) (FWB: RJIB) (WKN: A1XF0V) welcomed Dr. Beate Degen to its Board of Directors. This appointment is effective immediately. Dr. Degen brings a wealth of experience to the company, contributing to its growth and strategic direction.
news.headline: Dr. Beate Degen joins Rock Tech Lithium's Board of Directors; appointment effective immediately.
Dow Jones Industrial Average confirms it is in a correction, ending more than 10% below its record close.

news.summary: Westlake Village, California - April 04, 2025 - Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQT), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in immuno-dermatology advancements, disclosed the issuance of 35,000 restricted stock units of the company's common stock to five recently recruited employees. These grants were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of Arcutis’ Board of Directors and allocated under the Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. 2022 Inducement Plan on April 1, 2025. This action was deemed necessary to entice the new hires to join Arcutis, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Arcutis Biotherapeutics granted 35,000 restricted stock units to five new employees, approved by Compensation Committee.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, a company named Quest Resource Holding Corporation, identified as QRHC on Nasdaq, disclosed the divestiture of its tenant-direct segment within the RWS commercial property management sector. Quest is recognized as a prominent provider of environmental waste and recycling solutions nationwide.
news.headline: Quest Resource Holding Corp. sells tenant-direct portion of RWS business. Nasdaq: QRHC. Expert in environmental waste and recycling.

news.summary: Naarden, Netherlands, and Miami, April 04, 2025 - Today, NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. (NAMS), a clinical biopharmaceutical firm focused on developing oral, non-statin medications for patients at risk of cardiovascular disease with elevated LDL-C, revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors authorized the provision of 133,000 inducement share options for five new non-executive hires. These share options were granted under the 2024 Inducement Plan as a crucial element in the recruitment process, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: NewAmsterdam Pharma granted 133,000 share options to 5 new hires; developing non-statin meds for CVD patients.

news.summary: Artius II Acquisition Inc. (Nasdaq:AACBU) disclosed that from April 7, 2025, investors of the 22,000,000 units from the Company’s IPO can choose to independently trade the Class A ordinary shares and rights. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share, one right for a tenth of a Class A Ordinary Share, and a contingent right. The separated Class A ordinary shares and rights will be traded on The Nasdaq Global Market with the symbols “AACB” and “AACBR,” respectively. Units that remain combined will still trade as “AACBU” on The Nasdaq Global Market. Separating units into Class A ordinary shares and rights requires investors to have their brokers contact Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company, the Company’s transfer agent.
news.headline: Artius II Acquisition Inc. allows trading of Class A shares and rights from April 7, 2025. Initial public offering had 22,000,000 units.
Nasdaq Composite confirms it is in a bear market, ending more than 20% below its record close.
Trump and Federal Reserve on collision course.
Pandemic trading experiences resurface as stock tumult peaks.
Switzerland tariffs boost demand for used luxury watches, driving sales by 20%.
Wall Street in turmoil as global recession fears rise over tariff retaliation.
Fed's Powell reassures no rush to cut rates as markets decline; concerns over economy persist.
Market downturn halts billion-dollar M&A and IPOs.
Swiss tariffs boost demand for secondhand luxury watches, driving prices up.
Giga Metals finishes non-brokered private offering, securing significant funding.

news.summary: Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) has experienced a notable 18.4% decrease in value over the past 30 days, a significant drop compared to Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) 7% loss during the same period. Despite many traders holding positive long-term views on ETH, the recent volatility of the altcoin has sparked uncertainty and interest within the crypto community.The decline in Ethereum's value can be attributed to various factors. In early February, Eric Trump suggested it was an opportune moment to buy Ethereum, which garnered attention on Crypto Twitter. This statement was met with opposition from Bitcoin supporter Pierre Rochard, who advised against investing in Ethereum and listed it as an asset to steer clear of. Following these events, Ethereum's value plummeted by 39%.Furthermore, trader Wicked highlighted that World Liberty Financial executed a transfer of $175 million worth of ETH to Coinbase, potentially indicating a preparation for... (the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com).
news.headline: Eric Trump's endorsement of Ethereum saw a 39% loss; Ethereum down 18.4% last 30 days vs Bitcoin's 7% loss. Trader concerns rise.
Fed Chair Powell reassures no rush to cut rates as markets decline.

news.summary: President Donald Trump surprised many on Wednesday by announcing stricter tariffs, but with notable exceptions. Pharmaceuticals were spared from the new tariffs, providing relief to the industry. Earlier, Trump had hinted at a 25% tariff on pharmaceutical imports, but this move came as a positive surprise. Trump emphasized the importance of foreign countries in providing antibiotics for the U.S., stating that in the event of a war, the country would struggle to treat its sick. The biopharma sector has typically been shielded from tariffs, and the exemption from these new tariffs was welcomed by investors. The U.S. imports around $200 billion worth of pharmaceuticals, and the industry has a significant manufacturing presence in Europe. This news comes amidst concerns over potential disruptions from global tariffs to the sector.
news.headline: Trump exempts pharmaceuticals from new tariffs, alleviating industry fears. Concerns due to $200 billion US imports in meds.

news.summary: Is Nvidia (NVDA) a good buy now? Along with Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, and Tesla, Nvidia's stock is being closely watched. For Nvidia, stock quotes and company news can be found on Investor's Business Daily, providing valuable chart analysis to aid in decision-making for potential investors.
news.headline: Nvidia stock (NVDA) analysis and ratings with focus on top tech companies like Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Tesla.

news.summary: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve Chair, expressed surprise at the escalated tariffs imposed by Trump, emphasizing the need for further understanding of the economic situation. The S&P 500 is seeing a sustained decline in its value, indicating ongoing selling pressure. Powell's cautious stance has led to a turbulent period for the S&P 500, with investors closely monitoring the developments for market implications.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell faces Trump tariffs impact with S&P 500 selling off, seeks economic clarity.

news.summary: Klarna's initial public offering has been put on hold due to a dip in tech stock prices following President Trump's proposed tariffs. The postponement comes as a response to the uncertainty in the market. Klarna, a competitor of Affirm, has decided to pause its IPO plans amid the tariff turmoil. This move reflects the current instability in the financial sector. The decision to delay the IPO is a strategic response to the recent events impacting global markets.
news.headline: Klarna pauses IPO amid tariff turmoil as tech stocks slump due to Donald Trump's plans.

news.summary: On Friday, Nike and other clothing-related stocks bounced back following a decline on Thursday. The surge came after a slide in Trump tariffs. The Dow component Nike and other apparel-related stocks saw a rally, with significant gains. The positive movement in the market was marked by a strong recovery in share prices for these companies.
news.headline: Nike and apparel stocks rebound after Trump tariffs slide; Dow component Nike leading the rally.

news.summary: President Trump granted another extension to the TikTok ban deadline, citing progress in negotiating a deal. This marks the second time the ban has been extended. Speculation about a potential agreement continues to circulate. The information was featured in an article by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Trump extends TikTok ban deadline again as deal discussions continue, progress being made.

news.summary: For a second day in a row, Apple's stock dropped on Friday following the announcement of high tariffs by President Donald Trump. Despite speculation that Apple might receive an exemption from these tariffs, the company's stock continued to decline. This trend reflects the challenges faced by Apple in the current economic climate.
news.headline: Apple stock fell for 2nd day due to Trump's tariffs; speculation on exemption. Tariffs announced by President caused impact.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Bangalore, India, a report was released on the Thin Film Lithium Niobate (TFLN) Modulator Market. This market is divided into two main types: Thin Film Lithium Niobate Phase Modulator and Thin Film Lithium Niobate Intensity Modulator. The applications of these modulators include Optical Communication, Cable Television, Data Center, and more. This segment provides crucial insights and analysis of the market size, trends, and forecasts for the future. The Thin Film Lithium Niobate Modulator market is experiencing significant growth, with a focus on advanced technologies and increasing demand.
news.headline: TFLN modulator market to reach $3.8 billion by 2031, driven by optical communication, data centers, and 5G.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 4, 2025, Verae™, a top provider of blockchain-driven solutions for ensuring the integrity of digital information, shared that Jim Kofalt, the Chief Product Strategist at Verae, is scheduled to present at IAITAM ACE 2025 in Las Vegas. Kofalt's session will delve into the applications of blockchain technology.
news.headline: Verae to present on blockchain applications in IT Asset Management at IAITAM ACE 2025 conference in Las Vegas.

news.summary: Northisle, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, announced the submission of the 43-101 Report for its 2025 Preliminary Economic Assessment. The report contains detailed information on the company's findings and projections for future operations. This filing marks a significant step forward for Northisle and provides valuable insights into their plans moving forward.
news.headline: Northisle files NI43-101 Report for North Island Project, detailing findings for 2025 PEA.
Guidance related to tariffs announced April 2nd issued.
US issues guidance on tariffs going into effect April 5th.
